system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_tongsl_uv_ddh_get","body":"
--exec TR_Dinhmuc_Tongsl_UV_ddh_Get 'DQH-DQHF09/0922'

CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_Dinhmuc_Tongsl_UV_ddh_Get] (@maddh NVARCHAR (100))
AS
BEGIN
   --DECLARE @maddh   NVARCHAR (100) = 'DQH-DQHF09/0922'

   DECLARE @all_masp TABLE
                     (
                        masp       NVARCHAR (100),
                        mauuv      NVARCHAR (50),
                        soluong    FLOAT,
                        donhang    NVARCHAR (200)
                     )

   INSERT INTO @all_masp
      SELECT a.masp,
             b.mauuv,
             a.soluong,
             a.donhang
      --into #all_masp
      FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet a JOIN tr_sanpham b ON a.masp = b.masp
      WHERE maddh = @maddh


   DECLARE @masp   NVARCHAR (100)
   DECLARE @soluong   FLOAT
   DECLARE @mauuv   NVARCHAR (100)
   DECLARE @all_UV TABLE
                   (
                      masp              NVARCHAR (100),
                      mact              NVARCHAR (200),
					  quytrinh          NVARCHAR(500),
                      tongsoluong_uv    FLOAT,
                      mauuv             NVARCHAR (100)
                   )


	DECLARE @SANPHAM_M2 TABLE
	(
		masp nvarchar(100),
		mauuv nvarchar(50),
		m2_tc float
	)

   DECLARE cursorProduct CURSOR FOR SELECT masp, soluong, mauuv FROM @all_masp
   OPEN cursorProduct
   FETCH NEXT FROM cursorProduct   INTO @masp, @soluong, @mauuv
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
   BEGIN
      
	  DELETE @SANPHAM_M2

	INSERT INTO @SANPHAM_M2
      SELECT A.masp,
             A.mauuv,
             SUM (((C.rong_tc * C.dai_tc) / 1000000) * (B.mat1 + B.mat2)) AS 'm2_tc'
      FROM tr_sanpham A
           INNER JOIN tr_rout_uv B ON A.masp = B.masp
           INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan C
              ON B.masp = C.masp AND B.mact = C.mact
      WHERE A.masp = @masp
      GROUP BY A.masp, A.mauuv

	  INSERT INTO @all_UV
	  SELECT A.masp, B.mact, B.quytrinh, SUM(A.m2_tc * B.dinhluong * @soluong)/1000, A.mauuv
	  FROM @SANPHAM_M2 A INNER JOIN tr_quytrinh_lanuv B ON A.mauuv = B.bangmau
	  GROUP BY A.masp, B.mact, B.quytrinh, A.mauuv

	  --insert into #all_UV
      --INSERT INTO @all_UV
      --   SELECT a.masp,
      --          A.mact,
      --          sum (ISNULL (a.tongkg_uv, 0) * @soluong),
      --          @mauuv
      --   FROM tr_rout_uv a 
      --   WHERE a.masp = @masp
      --   GROUP BY a.masp, a.mact

      FETCH NEXT FROM cursorProduct   INTO @masp, @soluong, @mauuv
   END

   CLOSE cursorProduct
   DEALLOCATE cursorProduct


   SELECT A.masp, A.mact, B.mota, A.quytrinh, SUM(A.tongsoluong_uv) AS 'tongsoluong_uv' , A.mauuv
   FROM @all_UV A INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mact = B.mavt
   GROUP BY A.masp, A.mact, B.mota, A.quytrinh, A.mauuv
   --SELECT a.masp,
   --       a.mact,
   --       b.mota,
   --       b.dvt,
   --       a.mauuv,
   --       sum (a.tongsoluong_uv) AS 'tongsoluong_uv'
   --FROM @all_UV a INNER JOIN tr_material b ON a.mact = b.mavt
   --GROUP BY a.masp,
   --         a.mact,
   --         b.mota,
   --         b.dvt,
   --         a.mauuv
--drop table #all_masp--,#all_UV
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cursorproduct","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_quytrinh_lanuv","dbo.tr_rout_uv","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
